g.text: Run lifecycle: exploration becomes verified memory
tier 1, episodic memory - illustrative economics, not yet measured
marginal cost trends toward the VERIFICATION FLOOR: the price of proving the replay still holds
never toward unverified zero - trusting an unchecked replay is how wrong answers ship
honest status: the distiller that makes WARM automatic is P2 - today's playbooks are hand-written; replay + verify are built
